declaration.code:
@backDeployed(before: macOS 16.0, iOS 19.0, tvOS 19.0, watchOS 12.0, visionOS 3.0)
init(
    subframes: Int16,
    subframeDivisor: Int16,
    counter: UInt32,
    type: CVSMPTETimeType,
    flags: CVSMPTETimeFlags = .valid,
    hours: Int16,
    minutes: Int16,
    seconds: Int16,
    frames: Int16
)

Initializer# init(subframes:subframeDivisor:counter:type:flags:hours:minutes:seconds:frames:)

iOS 4.0+iPadOS 4.0+Mac Catalyst 4.0+macOS 10.4+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 4.0+

```
@backDeployed(before: macOS 16.0, iOS 19.0, tvOS 19.0, watchOS 12.0, visionOS 3.0)
init(
    subframes: Int16,
    subframeDivisor: Int16,
    counter: UInt32,
    type: CVSMPTETimeType,
    flags: CVSMPTETimeFlags = .valid,
    hours: Int16,
    minutes: Int16,
    seconds: Int16,
    frames: Int16
)
```
